Bash(venv/bin/python3 -c "
from src.benchmark.db import BenchmarkDB
from pathlib import Path
db = BenchmarkDB\(Path\('benchmark.db'\)\)
rows = db._conn.execute\('SELECT name, run_at, completed_at, test_doc_count, \(SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM results WHERE scenario_id = scenarios.id\) as done FROM scenarios ORDER BY id'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    status = 'COMPLETE' if r[2] else f'INTERRUPTED \({r[4]}/{r[3]} docs\)'
    print\(f'{r[0]}: {status}'\)
db.close\(\)
")

import re
_DOSE_PATTERN = re.compile\(r'\(\\d+\(?:[.,]\\d+\)?\)\\s*\(мг/кг|мг|мкг|мл|г\\b|ЕД|ME|%\)', re.IGNORECASE\)
text = open\('data/informed_consent_forms/text/ru/Form_006_RU.txt'\).read\(\)
matches = _DOSE_PATTERN.findall\(text\)
print\(f'Found {len\(matches\)} matches:'\)
for m in matches[:10]:
    print\(f'  {m}'\)
")
